descs.desc:
[WhenUse] Gain 2 [DefenseUp]
[DefeatDuel] Gain Shield by (3 * [DefenseUp] on self); Gain 1 [DefenseUp] next turn

[WhenUse] Gain 2 [DefenseUp]
[DefeatDuel] Gain Shield by (5 * [DefenseUp] on self); Gain 2 [DefenseUp] next turn

[WhenUse] Gain 3 [DefenseUp]
[WhenUse] Gain +2 [Aggro] to this Skill Slot next turn

[WhenUse] Gain 3 [DefenseUp]
[WhenUse] Gain +3 [Aggro] to this Skill Slot next turn
At 6+ [DefenseUp], Clash Power +1

[WhenUse] Apply 2 [Endurance] and 3 [DefenseUp] to all allies
At 6+ [DefenseUp], Coin Power +1
At 10+ [DefenseUp], deal +30% damage
coinDescs: [OnSucceedAttack] Apply 3 [DefenseUp] to all allies next turn

descs.desc:
[WhenUse] Apply 2 [Endurance] and 3 [DefenseUp] to all allies
Coin Power +1 per 6 [DefenseUp] (Max 3)
At 10+ [DefenseUp], deal +50% damage
coinDescs: [OnSucceedAttack] Apply 3 [DefenseUp] to all allies next turn

descs.desc:
[StartBattle] Gain Shield by (2 * [DefenseUp] on self)
[WhenUse] Gain +5 [Aggro] to this Skill Slot next turn

1120601.name: Combat Shield
1120601.desc:
If targeted by 2 or more attacks at the start of the combat phase, gain 2 [DefenseUp].
If at 50% or less HP at the start of the combat phase, gain 3 [DefenseUp].

1120621.name: Your Shield
1120621.desc: If 1 ally with the highest Max HP is targeted by 2 or more attacks, gain 3 [DefenseUp]
